diagrams.title: Thread Creation Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Shows the stages of creating and managing a thread from creation to termination
elements: Scheduler moves thread to running state
diagrams.purpose: Understanding thread lifecycle and state transitions in POSIX threads

diagrams.title: Mutex Lock Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Visual representation of mutex lock and unlock operations between threads
elements: Thread A calls mutex_lock() - acquires lock
Thread A enters critical section - accesses shared data
Thread B calls mutex_lock() - blocks waiting
Thread B acquires lock and enters critical section
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how mutex ensures mutual exclusion and prevents race conditions

diagrams.title: Producer-Consumer Problem Model
diagrams.description: Synchronized buffer between producer and consumer threads using condition variables
elements: Producer thread adds items when buffer not full
Consumer thread removes items when buffer not empty
Condition variable for buffer space available
Condition variable for buffer item available
diagrams.purpose: Understanding condition variable synchronization in classic producer-consumer problem
